title: eriosyce napina var. fankhauseri
intro: Eriosyce napina var. fankhauseri is a rare and endangered species of cactus that is native to the coastal regions of Chile. It is known for its unique, globular shape and vibrant green color. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the cactus is often used to make infusions or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to potentially benefit from its medicinal properties, including reduced inflammation and improved wound healing.
